title: Daily Standup with Cardona
summary: Daily standup covering progress on the guest name matching/cross-referencing system, bank reconciliation closing, and Service Desk QA strategy. Key outcomes include a decision to use Chatbase for WhatsApp demo numbers for the Faru Legal POC, a plan to reset user passwords in Supabase (except admin), and alignment on preparing a comprehensive commercial deliverable summarizing development hours and contract value for upcoming negotiations.

discussion_points.description: Discussed issues with name matching in the cross-reference file: asterisks prepended to names and 'Señor/Señora' suffixes are interfering with matches. Name normalization is already implemented. The system correctly filters out Bolivian nationals (report targets foreigners). Explored switching data source from Excel to API/XML for better integration.

discussion_points.topic: Faru Legal POC - WhatsApp Integration & Ticket Assignment
discussion_points.description: The Faru Legal proof of concept is built but barebones. Missing WhatsApp integration for ticket creation. Need a demo phone number — agreed to use Chatbase for free US numbers. Core flow: WhatsApp message creates a ticket, then an assignment routine allocates it to a lawyer by expertise. Ticket lifecycle stages: creation, assignment, work.

Debated whether to test internally first or hand off to stakeholders immediately. Agreed to do internal testing first, then deliver to the internal stakeholder with specific test flows and request structured feedback. Authentication layout broke, requiring a user password reset.

Five banks have been set up; closing expected this week. Frontend not yet delivered. Need to provision another database ($10). Waiting for confirmation that everything is ready before investing in frontend. Previous reconciliation achieved 75% automatic match rate.

Speaker 1 will compile all sent proposals and pending commercial items into a complete deliverable showing development hours invested, contract value, and cost reductions — to be used as a negotiation tool.

Meeting with Tomás: listen to his position on valuation, prepare counterarguments. Meeting with María: discuss document scope, ask about Liganoa and Faru Legal contacts. Possible meeting with Faru Legal tomorrow. Meeting with Caiceo also planned.

action_items.description: Finish the guest name matching/cross-referencing system
Review API endpoint and download XML to evaluate as alternative data source
Reset passwords for all Supabase users except admin
Advance Service Desk development and verify stakeholder-reported flows
Obtain a WhatsApp demo phone number via Chatbase
Investigate Chatbase webhook integration for ticket reception and user notifications
Prepare complete commercial deliverable (development hours, costs, contract details, proposals)
Attend meeting with Tomás — listen to his position and prepare counterarguments
Attend lunch meeting with María — discuss document scope and ask about Liganoa/Faru Legal contacts
Schedule meeting with Faru Legal (possibly tomorrow)

decisions: Do internal testing of Service Desk before releasing to stakeholders
Reset all Supabase user passwords except admin to fix authentication issues
Use Chatbase to obtain free US phone numbers for WhatsApp demos
Data format (XML vs Excel) is not critical right now — use whatever works with existing libraries on Render
Ticket assignment should be a separate routine that runs after ticket creation, not part of the creation step itself
Deliver a partial solution with tips if the full cross-referencing system cannot be completed today
next_steps: Finish cross-referencing system and evaluate API/XML data source
Reset Supabase user passwords and re-enable stakeholder access to Service Desk
Set up Chatbase WhatsApp number and integrate webhooks for Faru Legal POC demo
Meeting with Tomás to discuss valuation and negotiation position
Lunch meeting with María to discuss legal document scope
Possible meeting with Faru Legal tomorrow
Compile commercial pipeline deliverable with all proposals and values for negotiation

diagrams.title: Guest Name Cross-Referencing Pipeline
diagrams.mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A["Input: Excel / API Data"] --> B["Raw Guest Names"]
    B --> C{"Name Normalization"}
    C --> D["Remove Asterisks"]
    C --> E["Remove Senor/Senora"]
    C --> F["Trim Whitespace"]
    D --> G["Normalized Name"]
    E --> G
    F --> G
    G --> H{"Nationality Filter"}
    H -->|"Bolivian"| I["Exclude from Report"]
    H -->|"Foreign"| J["Include in Report"]
    J --> K{"Match Against Reference File"}
    K -->|"Match Found"| L["Matched Record"]
    K -->|"No Match / Close Match"| M["Manual Review Queue"]
    L --> N["Cross-Referenced Output Report"]

diagrams.title: Service Desk Ticket Lifecycle via WhatsApp
diagrams.mermaid_code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant WA as WhatsApp / Chatbase
    participant API as Service Desk API
    participant AR as Assignment Routine
    participant L as Lawyer
    participant N as Notification Service

    U->>WA: Send message describing case
    WA->>API: Webhook - Create Ticket
    API->>API: Save ticket in DB
    API->>AR: Trigger assignment routine
    AR->>AR: Evaluate lawyer expertise
    AR->>API: Assign ticket to lawyer
    API->>N: Send notification
    N->>L: Notify assigned lawyer
    N->>U: Confirm ticket created
    L->>API: Begin work on ticket

diagrams.title: Overall Platform Architecture
diagrams.mermaid_code:
flowchart LR
    subgraph Clients
        FE["React Frontend\nVercel"]
        WA["WhatsApp\nChatbase"]
    end

    subgraph Backend["Backend - Render"]
        API["FastAPI"]
        XRef["Cross-Reference\nEngine"]
        SD["Service Desk\nModule"]
        FL["Faru Legal\nPOC"]
        BR["Bank\nReconciliation"]
    end

    subgraph Data
        DB[("PostgreSQL\nSupabase")]
        Excel["Excel Files"]
        ExtAPI["External API\nXML"]
    end

    FE --> API
    WA --> API
    API --> XRef
    API --> SD
    API --> FL
    API --> BR
    XRef --> DB
    SD --> DB
    FL --> DB
    BR --> DB
    XRef --> Excel
    XRef --> ExtAPI
